results.abstract: A device for maintaining an optical path of an optical imaging system free of fog includes an elongated member having a distal end and a proximal end, a near-infrared (NIR) light-absorbing optical window disposed at the distal end, and an optical system disposed along the optical path. results.title: DUAL MODE CAMERA AND QUASI-BANDPASS FILTER
results.abstract: A dual mode camera may have a camera module and a light source.
